channel.title: AI on Jitendra Rawat's Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Jitendra Rawat's Tech Blog

item.title: Building Pahadi AI — A RAG-Powered Garhwali Chatbot for an Endangered Language
item.description: How I built Pahadi AI — a Garhwali-speaking assistant on PahadiTube — using multi-tier caching, RAG over a hand-curated glossary, and a 3-provider LLM fallback chain. All running on free tiers.

item.title: Claude Code Template for Spring Boot — A Practical Guide
item.description: How to set up and use a Claude Code template for generating high-quality Spring Boot applications — covering CLAUDE.md, skills, subagents, and best practices.
